description: Mapping for upstream research data from data.stfc.space: summary-research.json and per-node research/{id}.json buffs.

id.description: Research id (rid) used to fetch per-node details.
Research id as used by data.stfc.space and research/{id}.json.
Research id; must match summary id.

max_level.description: Maximum research level according to detail response.

buffs.description: Per-research buffs, each with id, value_is_percentage, values[].

id.description: Buff id shared with buildings and other upstream data.

value_is_percentage.description: If true, values[].value is percentage-like and must be normalized to a fraction before use.

values.description: Per-level buff values, usually cumulative; index i corresponds to level i+1.

relations.description: summary-research.json id matches research/{id}.json id for each node.
import_stfcspace_research.mjs reuses buff_id_to_stat.json and RESEARCH_BUFF_MAPPING to map research buff ids to engine stats.

normalization_targets.description: scripts/import_stfcspace_research.mjs converts mapped research buffs into KOBAYASHI research_catalog items with levels[].bonuses[].

notes: Buff semantics for many research buffs are still uncertain; RESEARCH_BUFF_MAPPING in scripts/import_stfcspace_research.mjs is intentionally sparse.
When adding new research buff mappings, prefer reusing buff->stat mappings from data/buildings/buff_id_to_stat.json where ids overlap.
